contact_admin_subtitle: View, qualify and process requests sent from your frontend forms.
contact_forms_editor_subtitle: Create, edit and delete your contact forms directly from the admin area.
contact_forms_list_subtitle: Manage your forms with the same CRUD workflow as other modules.
contact_form_translations_help: Manage frontend form texts per language. Field structure and logic still follow the source language.
contact_form_translation_fields_help: Translate here the labels, placeholders, help texts, and options shown on the frontend.
contact_messages_modal_subtitle: Browse your message list and read each message in full-screen mode inside this modal.
contact_forms_editor_readonly: You currently have read-only access to this editor.
contact_form_submit_placeholder: Leave empty to use the global label
contact_form_success_placeholder: Leave empty to use the global success message
contact_form_description_placeholder: Used only in the admin area.
contact_form_validation_slug_taken: This slug is already used by another form.
contact_form_validation_email_invalid: The recipient email address is invalid.
contact_form_custom_fields_help: Add custom fields (text, choices, date, etc.) to enrich your contact form.
contact_form_builder_preview_help: Add fields and edit them from the hover icons in the live preview.
contact_form_builder_empty_help: Add a field to start building your form.
contact_form_builder_inspector_none: Select a field in the preview to edit it.
contact_form_custom_position_end: At the end of the form
contact_form_options_modal_help: Edit the available values for this field and add or remove entries as needed. Changes are saved when you save the form.
contact_form_attachments_extensions_help: Separate extensions with commas (example: pdf, docx, png).
contact_form_validation_custom_limit: You can add up to 24 custom fields per form.
contact_form_validation_custom_label_req: The label for custom field #:position is required.
contact_form_validation_custom_type_inva: The field type for " :label " is invalid.
contact_form_validation_custom_key_requi: The technical key for " :label " is invalid.
contact_form_validation_custom_options_r: The field " :label " requires at least one option.
contact_form_validation_attachments_max_: The maximum number of attachments must be between 1 and 5.
The maximum attachment size must be between 1 and 25 MB.
contact_form_validation_attachments_exte: Provide at least one allowed extension for attachments.
contact_page_intro: Use the form below and we will reply as soon as possible.
contact_form_attachments_drop_hint: or click to browse from your device
contact_form_attachments_front_help: Up to :max_files file(s), :max_size MB max per file. Extensions: :extensions
contact_notification_body_intro: A new message has been submitted from your contact form.
contact_submit_success: Your message has been sent successfully.
contact_submit_error_required: Please fill in all required fields.
contact_submit_error_email: Please enter a valid email address.
contact_submit_error_message_length: Your message must contain between 10 and 5000 characters.
contact_submit_error_rate_limit: Please wait a few seconds before sending another message.
contact_submit_error_csrf: Security token invalid. Please refresh and try again.
contact_submit_error_captcha: Anti-spam verification failed. Please try again.
contact_submit_error_captcha_unavailable: Anti-spam is currently unavailable. Please contact the site administrator.
contact_submit_error_custom_email: The field " :field " must contain a valid email address.
contact_submit_error_custom_url: The field " :field " must contain a valid URL.
contact_submit_error_custom_number: The field " :field " must contain a valid number.
contact_submit_error_custom_date: The field " :field " must contain a valid date.
contact_submit_error_custom_option: The field " :field " contains an invalid option.
contact_submit_error_attachments_require: Please add at least one attachment.
contact_submit_error_attachments_count: You can upload up to :max attachment(s).
contact_submit_error_attachments_size: One attachment exceeds the maximum allowed size (:max MB).
contact_submit_error_attachments_type: One attachment file type is not allowed.
contact_form_front_unavailable: No contact form is currently available.
contact_submit_error_form_unavailable: This contact form is currently unavailable.
contact_form_type_help: Select a preset to generate a functional base form.
contact_form_preset_apply_confirm: Changing the form type will replace the current fields with the selected preset. Continue?
contact_form_preset_contact_success: Your message has been sent successfully.
contact_form_newsletter_consent_label: I agree to receive communications and accept the legal terms.
contact_form_preset_quote_success: Your quote request has been sent.
contact_form_preset_support_success: Your support request has been sent.
contact_form_validation_type_invalid: The selected form type is invalid.
contact_form_validation_legal_url_invali: The legal notice URL is invalid.
contact_form_validation_privacy_url_inva: The privacy policy URL is invalid.
contact_submit_error_consent_required: Consent is required to complete this subscription.
contact_form_newsletter_system_page_hint: Required system page, not deletable from the Pages module.
contact_tour_list_toolbar_content: From this toolbar, open the message inbox and create a new contact form.
contact_tour_list_table_content: The list shows each form, its shortcode, its status, and its edit or activation actions.
contact_tour_form_main_content: This screen brings together the full configuration of the active form. The recommended order is simple: name and type, then slug and recipient email, then fields, translations, and finally global options.
contact_tour_form_builder_content: Build the form field by field here, choose the submit button label and success message, then add or reorder custom fields according to the business need.
contact_tour_form_translations_content: Open this modal after the source version is finalized. Then translate labels, placeholders, help texts, and options without changing the main form structure.
contact_tour_form_sidebar_content: This panel gathers the global form options: activation, default status, attachments, quick field creation, and final save. Review it just before going live.
contact_tour_list_empty_content: Create your first form here, start with its source version, then configure its fields, destination email, and translations. You will then be able to insert it into a page through its shortcode.
contact_tour_list_ready_next_content: Open an existing form now to review its structure, shortcode, inbox, and translations before deploying it on a page or contact section.
contact_tour_form_identity_content: Define the internal name, type, slug, and recipient email here. This is the form foundation: set it first so you do not have to fix the shortcode or email target later.
contact_tour_form_legal_content: For GDPR newsletter forms, these links point to the system pages used for legal notice and privacy policy. Review them before publishing so consent stays consistent.
contact_tour_form_canvas_content: Use this preview to check field order, visible labels, and the user flow before the final save. Click a field to fine-tune its settings in the dedicated panel.
contact_tour_form_create_next_content: Save the source form first, then open the translation modal and test the shortcode on a page. Finish with a real submission test before publishing.
contact_tour_form_edit_next_content: Save your changes, review translations, send a real test, and check the inbox. You can then republish the shortcode or the page that uses it.
contact_help_intro: Create the form structure in the source locale, then adapt the frontend texts and finally monitor incoming messages from the inbox.
contact_help_step_structure: Start with the source structure: fields, options, recipient, form type, and form behavior.
contact_help_step_translations: Then open the Translations modal to adapt labels, placeholders, help texts, and options in each locale.
contact_help_step_messages: Finally come back to the inbox to read, qualify, and archive incoming messages.
contact_detail_help_intro: Handle each message in the right order: verify the sender first, then read the content, and finally archive or follow up as needed.
contact_detail_help_step_sender: Start by checking identity, email, phone, and message status before taking action.
contact_detail_help_step_message: Then review the message body, extra fields, and attachments to qualify the request correctly.
contact_detail_help_step_followup: Finish by marking the message as read, new, or archived according to your follow-up flow.
contact_empty_text: Create a first source form to start receiving requests. You can then translate the frontend labels and monitor incoming messages.
